title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Bharat Heavy Electricals

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Bharat Heavy Electricals
jsonLd.description:
Bharat Heavy Electricals is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Kanpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Bharat Heavy Electricals:
Bharat Heavy Electricals is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bharat Heavy Electricals!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
